message:
fix: replace magic 86400 with named constants and add version guard test

bd-hpt8.1: Replace inline 86400/86_400_000 with named SECS_PER_DAY,
MS_PER_DAY, and NANOS_PER_DAY constants across 7 analysis files
(alerts, triage, forecast, drift, git_history, causal).

bd-hpt8.2: Simplify recipe.rs has_blockers filter by removing the
empty if-body and using a single conditional with clarifying comment.

bd-hpt8.3: Add detailed rationale documentation for the 8-component
triage scoring weights explaining the 42% structural / 30% operational
/ 5% staleness balance and the Go legacy conformance constraint.

bd-0loi.1: Add version_guard test in lib.rs that scans all production
source code for hard-coded version string literals ("1.0.0", "0.1.0",
etc.) that should use env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION"). Allowlists agents.rs
(HTML markers) and viewer_assets.rs (embedded content).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
